You should consider getting this game (if you haven't already) because it has mods, it has a GREAT community, and moderators, admins, play fab managers, and developers are actually SO nice, and they are ALL W. Another thing is that any bad reviews, are LIES!

I just got the game today and I was playing and there is mods so I was using the mods and I got banned for using them in a game were you can use mods and for a matter a fact they don’t have, a mode for you to use these mods so I am going to keep playing with it but they should have somthing for you to use these mods mods in so this will be only to stars I would make it one star but it is still fun but they should make a mode that you can use the mods in so I am not very happy and I just started playing today

This game offers alot to everyone! You get free shiny rox, every cosmetic in the shop is only 1 shiny roc, and the staff and dev team are so cool and nice - this game have 4 mod menus that can only be used in other game modes besides comp infection. Overall this game is amazing!

This game has tons of things to offer that can differ from other games. And it also has things that make the players follow the rules. You get millions of shiny rocks and many mod menus to choose. It has a good community and the moderators are amazing. (I’m totally not unknown gtag lol)
